docket_entries.description: DEMURRER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT SIERRA CLUB HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SIERRA CLUB'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT ANY JUDGMENT IN THIS CASE WOULD BIND DUNCAN, AS A CONSEQUENCE, DUNCAN IS NEITHER A NECESSARY NOR INDISPENSABLE PARTY. BY PROCEEDING IN THIS WAY, PLAINTIFF IS TAKING THE RISK THAT DUNCAN WILL MAKE A CLAIM BUT THAT IS A RISK PLAINTIFF APPEARS WILLING TO TAKE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
